title: doronicum plantagineum subsp. carpetanum
intro: Doronicum plantagineum subsp. carpetanum, commonly known as the yellow leopard's bane, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems. Doronicum plantagineum subsp. carpetanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to soothe digestive issues and alleviate menstrual cramps.
